assertions.assertion: Output sets options.Authentication.CookieLifetime to TimeSpan.FromHours(8) and CookieSlidingExpiration to false

assertions.rationale: Does NOT set `options.PushedAuthorization.Required = true`. Instead says 'For PAR... you would need to check the specific configuration options available in your version of IdentityServer.' This misses the Duende-specific PAR configuration.
